project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4
test_framework: None configured (no test dependencies or test files exist)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to restore dependencies. 2. Run npm run build to verify the project compiles. 3. Run npm run lint to check for lint errors.
environment_constraints: Network access available (COMMON_DEPENDENCIES or OPEN_INTERNET). npm registry accessible. No test framework installed - verification is via build + lint.
contribution_requirements: AGENTS.md says: This is Next.js 16 with breaking changes. Read relevant docs from node_modules/next/dist/docs/ before writing code. Heed deprecation notices.
key_patterns: - Client components use 'use client' directive at top of file. - AudioPlayerContext provides a React context pattern for shared state (createContext + Provider + useContext hook). - Components live in app/components/. - Library code lives in lib/. - Tailwind CSS 4 with custom theme colors defined in globals.css via @theme inline. - Dark mode via prefers-color-scheme media query in CSS variables. - Responsive classes: sm:, lg:, xl: breakpoints. - Semantic HTML with aria-labels on sections. - TrackCard is a Link wrapping a card. - ItunesTrack is the main data type in lib/types.ts. - App Router pages use async components and Promise-based params.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js App Router pages and components. app/components/ - Reusable UI components. app/track/[id]/ - Track detail page with dynamic route. lib/ - Shared utilities and types (itunes.ts, types.ts). public/ - Static assets.
